summary.notes: Most assertions pass. Implementation gaps noted for include parameter and is_whale field.

VAL-ONCHAIN-ADV-011.description: Megafilter GET /onchain/pools/megafilter returns pools with multi-criteria filtering
VAL-ONCHAIN-ADV-011.evidence: Returns data array with pool objects containing attributes: name, address, reserve_in_usd, volume_usd_h24, tx_count_h24, price_usd, pool_created_at, base_token_address, base_token_symbol, quote_token_address, quote_token_symbol

VAL-ONCHAIN-ADV-012.description: Megafilter network param scopes results to specified network
VAL-ONCHAIN-ADV-012.evidence: All returned pools have network='eth' in relationships

VAL-ONCHAIN-ADV-013.description: Megafilter exchange filter narrows results to specified dex
VAL-ONCHAIN-ADV-013.evidence: All returned pools have dex='uniswap_v3' in relationships

VAL-ONCHAIN-ADV-014.description: Megafilter range filters: tx_count, pool_age_hours, liquidity_usd
VAL-ONCHAIN-ADV-014.evidence: Range filters work: min_tx_count_h24 and min_reserve_in_usd correctly filter results. pool_age_hours not available (uses pool_created_at timestamp)

VAL-ONCHAIN-ADV-015.description: Megafilter include param includes relationships (network, dex, base_token, quote_token)
VAL-ONCHAIN-ADV-015.evidence: INCLUDE PARAM NOT IMPLEMENTED - The include parameter is not in the schema and does not add 'included' array to response. Network and dex relationships ARE included in each pool's relationships object by default, but base_token and quote_token relationships are NOT included as separate included resources.

VAL-ONCHAIN-ADV-015A.description: Megafilter rejects malformed filters and invalid sort values with 400 error
VAL-ONCHAIN-ADV-015A.evidence: Returns 400 error with message: 'Unsupported sort value: invalid_sort'

VAL-ONCHAIN-ADV-016.evidence: page and per_page parameters work correctly, returning different data on different pages

VAL-ONCHAIN-ADV-017.description: Top holders GET /onchain/networks/{network}/tokens/{address}/top_holders returns holder list
VAL-ONCHAIN-ADV-017.evidence: Returns data array with holder objects

VAL-ONCHAIN-ADV-018.description: Holder data structure includes address, balance, share_of_supply
VAL-ONCHAIN-ADV-018.evidence: Holder attributes include: address, balance, share_of_supply

VAL-ONCHAIN-ADV-018A.description: Holder percentage sum validated to be <=100%

VAL-ONCHAIN-ADV-019.description: Top holders network scoping works via URL path

VAL-ONCHAIN-ADV-023.description: Include param for top holders relationships
VAL-ONCHAIN-ADV-023.evidence: INCLUDE PARAM NOT IMPLEMENTED - include parameter does not add 'included' array to response. Also, invalid include values are silently ignored (no 400 error)

VAL-ONCHAIN-ADV-024.description: Pagination for top holders via holders parameter
VAL-ONCHAIN-ADV-024.evidence: holders parameter limits results to specified count

VAL-ONCHAIN-ADV-024A.description: Sort options for top holders (holdings, token_amount)
VAL-ONCHAIN-ADV-024A.evidence: Sort parameters (holdings, token_amount) accepted without error. Invalid sort returns 400.

VAL-ONCHAIN-ADV-020.description: Top traders GET /onchain/networks/{network}/tokens/{address}/top_traders returns trader list
VAL-ONCHAIN-ADV-020.evidence: Returns data array with trader objects

VAL-ONCHAIN-ADV-021.description: Trader data structure includes address, volume_usd, trade_count, is_whale
VAL-ONCHAIN-ADV-021.evidence: Trader attributes include: address, volume_usd, buy_volume_usd, sell_volume_usd, realized_pnl_usd, trade_count. MISSING: is_whale field

VAL-ONCHAIN-ADV-021A.description: Trader whale flag classification based on volume
VAL-ONCHAIN-ADV-021A.evidence: is_whale field does not exist in trader attributes

VAL-ONCHAIN-ADV-022.description: Top traders network scoping via URL path
VAL-ONCHAIN-ADV-022.evidence: meta includes 'network': 'eth'. Also supports include_address_label parameter.

implementation_gaps.current_behavior: include parameter is not in the query schema and is ignored. Relationships for network and dex are included in the relationships object by default, but base_token and quote_token are not included as separate resources.
implementation_gaps.expected_behavior: include=base_token,quote_token should add token relationships to 'included' array per JSON:API spec

implementation_gaps.current_behavior: include parameter is silently ignored. Invalid include values do not trigger validation errors.
implementation_gaps.expected_behavior: include=token,network should add relationships to 'included' array, invalid values should return 400

implementation_gaps.current_behavior: Trader attributes include: address, volume_usd, buy_volume_usd, sell_volume_usd, realized_pnl_usd, trade_count. No is_whale field.
implementation_gaps.expected_behavior: Response should include is_whale boolean field based on volume threshold

implementation_gaps.description: Top traders include parameter not implemented
implementation_gaps.expected_behavior: include=token should add token relationship to 'included' array

endpoint_notes.note: Endpoint path differs from validation contract
endpoint_notes.detail: Validation contract specifies /onchain/pools/{pool_address}/top_holders but actual implementation is /onchain/networks/{network}/tokens/{address}/top_holders
The pool_age_hours field is not available in megafilter. Instead, pool_created_at timestamp is provided which can be used to calculate age.
Unlike invalid sort values which return 400, invalid include values are silently accepted without returning an error.
